title: trond build output
description: Returned by `trond build ... -o json`. Same shape on first build (cache_hit=false) and cache hit (cache_hit=true, duration_ms close to 0). On failure, the error envelope shape (schemas/output/error.schema.json) is emitted instead.

cache_key.description: Content-addressed identifier of this build. Format: <git-sha7>-b<digest6>[+dirty-<patch8>][-x<extra6>]. Same source + same builder image + same task + same args yields the same key.

source_revision.description: Full git sha resolved from the requested revision spec.

dirty.description: True when the source working tree had uncommitted edits or untracked files at build time.

artifact_path.description: Absolute path to the produced JAR (artifact_kind=jar).

sha256.description: sha256 of the produced JAR contents (artifact_kind=jar).

builder_image.description: Fully-qualified builder image reference, including @sha256: digest portion.

cache_hit.description: True when this invocation returned a previously-built artifact without re-running gradle.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock time of this invocation. Cache hits return durations < 200ms.

created_at.description: Timestamp the manifest was first written (NOT this invocation's timestamp on a cache hit).
